cidr_blocks.description: A list of CIDR blocks for IPv4 addresses provided by AWS.

create_date.description: The date when the AWS IP ranges data was created.

id.description: The identifier for the AWS IP ranges data.

ipv6_cidr_blocks.description: A list of CIDR blocks for IPv6 addresses provided by AWS.

sync_token.description: A token indicating the version of the AWS IP ranges data.
